A hand-authored sample level fixture for S2.4's round-trip test is schema-validation scaffolding, not campaign content, and is explicitly in scope.

Before flipping any REQ to VERIFIED at a future milestone close, follow dm-0008's rule: check that REQ's OWN Phase column in requirements_backlog.md, not a phase's execution-plan checklist wording, which may be stale/simplistic (this is exactly what was found and corrected for M0).

Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS in Clock.ts or introduce delta-time scaling (dm-0003). Do NOT mutate GameState in place (dm-0004). Engine commits even on a zero-step tick by design (dm-0007). src/components/* must be logic-free plain data (directory_structure.md) — if you're tempted to write a function body inside a component file, it belongs in src/systems/ instead.
